work_items.title: Build Hub queue lifecycle API foundation
work_items.description: Expose the M17 local queue lifecycle through safe Hub API endpoints for add, inspect readiness, start, generate Codex prompt, and complete with evidence. The endpoints must remain local-only, gated, and must not execute agents, Codex, LLMs, GitHub API, gh, PRs, issues, workflow activity, or network calls.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Hub API exposes local-only endpoints for add queue item, inspect readiness, start item, generate Codex prompt, and complete item with evidence; endpoints return stable JSON; endpoints reuse existing M17 operators; tests cover success and gated failure paths; no Hub mutation UI is added in this task.
work_items.validation_summary: M18 Hub queue lifecycle API foundation was implemented by Codex and validated locally. Route-level tests passed with 7 passed. Core targeted validation passed with 232 passed. Hub UI/API targeted validation passed with 80 passed. Local dashboard/report targeted validation passed with 13 passed.
work_items.evidence_note: Added local-only Hub API endpoints for add queue item, inspect readiness, start item, generate Codex prompt, and complete item with evidence. No Hub mutation UI, agent execution, LLM routing, GitHub API, gh, PR, issue, workflow, or network execution was added.
tests_run: git diff --check; python -m pytest tests/test_hub_local_queue_lifecycle_api.py; python -m pytest tests/test_roadmap_db_control.py tests/test_config_and_migrations.py tests/test_cli.py; python -m pytest tests/test_hub_project_factory_api.py tests/test_hub_active_project_api.py tests/test_hub_ui_foundation.py; python -m pytest tests/test_local_queue_agent_summary.py tests/test_local_project_dashboard.py tests/test_local_project_report.py

work_items.title: M77 Codex CLI Dispatch Contract
work_items.description: Define the operator-gated Codex CLI dispatch contract, run-state model, evidence fields, dry-run/no-execute behavior, and safety boundaries before any process invocation exists.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Contract is documented and testable.
- Dry-run/no-execute behavior is explicit.
- No Codex process invocation is added.
- No automatic queue execution is added.
- No GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow, or external mutation behavior is added.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

routing_metadata.routing_reason: M76 seed: contract-first planning only; no dispatch.

work_items.title: M78 Operator-Gated Codex CLI Dispatch Prototype
work_items.description: Prototype one explicitly operator-approved Codex CLI dispatch for one local queue item after M77 contract is complete.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Requires explicit operator approval.
- Allows only one queue item at a time.
- Does not auto-run the next item.
- Captures run state and available stdout/stderr/artifacts.
- Records error and completion states.
- Requires review evidence before completion.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

routing_metadata.routing_reason: Future operator-gated prototype after M77; no execution from M76.
routing_metadata.escalation_reason: Future operator-gated prototype after M77; no execution from M76.

work_items.title: M79 Queue Blocking and Sequencing Enforcement
work_items.description: Enforce queue/dependency blocking so downstream items cannot move forward until upstream LLM/Codex work is completed, reviewed, validated, and evidenced.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Dependent items remain blocked while upstream run state is active or incomplete.
- Completion requires review evidence.
- No unattended multi-item execution is introduced.
- No automatic next-item execution is introduced.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

routing_metadata.routing_reason: Queue lifecycle enforcement must stay operator-gated.

work_items.title: M80 LLM Decision Matrix v2
work_items.description: Define routing logic for Local LLM vs Codex, coding vs reasoning, model/profile selection, task sizing, risk classification, validation burden, and safety gating.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Routing remains advisory unless an approved execution gate applies.
- Local LLM recommendations remain local-only and non-mutating.
- Codex recommendations remain prompt-generation/operator-handoff unless approved dispatch exists.
- Task risk and validation burden are included.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

routing_metadata.routing_reason: Decision matrix remains advisory unless future approved gates apply.
